<think>I opened DOC2_A5 and found the exact minority interest (少数股东权益) data in the consolidated balance sheet. The verbatim text shows:

"少数股东权益|293,936,136.56|332,241,063.68|"

This represents:
- 期末余额 (ending balance): 293,936,136.56元
- 期初余额 (beginning balance): 332,241,063.68元

Since I'm only processing DOC2 and the question asks about multiple companies, I should extract the evidence from this document and stop. The Composer will handle combining evidence from all documents.
